# Drop Copy Gateway Fix

> Drop Copy Gateway providing FIX 5.0 SP2 protocol for near-real-time trade stream dissemination

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** fix-protocol · drop-copy · trade-dissemination

## What this does

Drop Copy Gateway providing FIX 5.0 SP2 protocol for near-real-time trade stream dissemination

Specifies 2 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **execution_id** *(text, required)* — Execution identifier
- **order_id** *(text, required)* — Order ID
- **instrument_id** *(text, required)* — Security identifier
- **side** *(select, required)* — Trade direction
- **execution_qty** *(number, required)* — Executed quantity
- **execution_price** *(number, required)* — Execution price

## What must be true

- **protocol → fix_version:** FIX 5.0 Service Pack 2
- **protocol → direction:** Server-to-client (receive-only)
- **protocol → message_format:** Binary FIXT-formatted messages
- **trade_reporting → message_type:** Execution Report with full party details
- **trade_reporting → timing:** Near real-time delivery
- **trade_reporting → completeness:** All executed trades disseminated

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Trade Execution** — when Buy and sell orders match, then Trade available for dissemination. _Why: Trade matches on exchange._
- **Trade Dissemination** — when Execution Report generated, then Trade delivered. _Why: Trade reported to subscribers._

## Errors it can return

- `CONNECTION_FAILED` — Cannot establish connection
- `HEARTBEAT_TIMEOUT` — No heartbeat from counterparty
- `RECOVERY_UNAVAILABLE` — Recovery channel unavailable

## Events

**`trade.executed`**
  Payload: `execution_id`, `order_id`, `side`

**`trade.disseminated`**
  Payload: `execution_id`

## Connects to

- **client-failure-recovery** *(required)*
